thinks.think: The shot transitions from a circular iris view to a full rectangular frame, revealing an indoor setting. An elderly figure with a long white beard and pointed hat stands beside a large telescope mounted on a stand. He gestures while facing a small character wearing a hat. A poster on the wall displays a ringed planet, stars, and a crescent moon. The telescope is angled upwards.

The elderly figure with the white beard lowers his gesturing hand and clasps both hands together near his waist, shifting his gaze downward. The small black character wearing a hat smiles broadly, raising its paws in an animated gesture while facing the bearded figure. The telescope and wall poster remain stationary.

The elderly figure with the white beard stands still with hands clasped at his waist, gazing downward. The small black character wearing a hat maintains raised paws and a wide open mouth, shifting slightly in an animated gesture while facing the taller figure near the telescope.

The elderly figure with the white beard leans forward toward the large telescope. He raises one hand to his forehead while angling his body to approach the eyepiece. The small black character remains standing nearby, observing the action. The background poster and telescope stand remain unchanged.

The bearded figure stands upright and raises his right index finger high while smiling, then leans forward with hands clasped near his chest. The small black character remains standing nearby, observing the figure's gestures next to the large telescope mounted on a stand.

The bearded figure raises his right hand with an index finger pointing upward while leaning forward. Then, the scene abruptly cuts to a black screen where only a faint vertical white line is visible on the left side, removing all previous characters and background elements from view.

The scene transitions from a black screen to a circular iris view revealing a large metal box labeled SAFE. An elderly figure with a white beard stands to the right, observing the object. The frame expands to a full rectangular view. The figure gestures with open hands toward the safe, which features a combination dial and handle on its door.

A small black cat character with large eyes enters the frame on the right side, standing behind the elderly figure. The bearded figure moves closer to the large metal box labeled SAFE and reaches out with his left hand to touch the door near the handle.

The bearded figure grasps the handle of the metal box labeled SAFE and swings the door open. He then bends forward at the waist, leaning his upper body into the dark interior of the safe while the small black cat sits nearby watching.

The bearded figure stands upright holding a round bag marked with a dollar sign near the open safe, offering it to the small black cat who reaches out with both paws. The scene cuts to the cat clutching the money bag against its chest while smiling broadly against a plain background.

The black cat character, no longer holding the round money bag, walks briskly toward the right side of the frame. Its arms swing freely and legs stride along a horizontal line against a plain, light background. The character maintains a wide smile while moving across the empty screen.

The black cat character, previously walking empty-handed, is now shown holding the round money bag with a dollar sign again. The cat smiles broadly and clutches the bag against its chest while facing right. The bag features a tied top. The background remains a plain light color with a horizontal line.

The black cat character spreads both arms wide before holding the round money bag in one hand and waving with the other. The character smiles broadly. The bag features a tied top and dollar sign. The background remains a plain light color with a horizontal line.

The black cat character is no longer holding the round money bag. The character stands facing forward with arms bent, hands near the lower torso. The character's body appears rounded or distended in the midsection against the plain background.

The scene returns to the large metal box labeled SAFE, standing on the left with its door open. The small black cat character is positioned to the right of the safe, facing forward with arms bent outward. The character's midsection is no longer distended, appearing normal in size against the plain background.

The black cat character stands beside the open metal safe labeled SAFE on the left. The character's body has returned to a normal, slender size after being distended. The cat faces forward with arms extended slightly outward, positioned on the horizontal line.

A small black cat stands to the right of a large metal box labeled SAFE with its door swung open. The character holds its arms bent at the elbows near its chest while facing slightly left toward the safe interior. The background remains a plain, light color with a horizontal floor line visible beneath the character.

The small black cat character, standing beside the open metal box labeled SAFE, is now holding a round bag marked with a dollar sign. The character clutches the sack with both hands while facing slightly left toward the safe interior. The safe door remains swung open on the left side of the frame against the plain background.

The black cat character places the round bag marked with a dollar sign back inside the open metal box labeled SAFE. The character then pushes the heavy safe door closed, standing beside the large box on the plain background with a horizontal floor line visible.

The small black cat character lifts the entire large metal box labeled SAFE. The box tilts upward as the character positions itself underneath. The character then walks toward the right side of the frame, carrying the heavy safe on its back against the plain background.

The small black cat character walks toward the right edge of the frame, carrying the large metal box labeled SAFE on its back. As the figure progresses, both the character and the heavy box gradually exit the view, leaving mostly empty space with only the corner of the safe visible before disappearing completely.

The small black character walks off the right side of the screen while carrying the large metal box labeled SAFE on its back. Once the figure exits completely, the frame remains empty showing only the plain light background and the horizontal floor line at the bottom.

An iris wipe reveals an outdoor scene with a fence and hanging items. A large metal box labeled SAFE sits on the left. The black cat turns the dial while a small bird character watches. The cat holds a money bag tied by a rope to the bird character.

The safe door swings open to reveal a stack of round bags marked with dollar signs. The black cat stands beside the small bird character, gesturing with an arm toward the bird while the bags remain piled at the safe's entrance against the fence background.

The black cat character extends an arm to grab the small bird character by the neck. The bird stands facing the cat while being held. To the left, the safe door stays open, revealing a stack of round bags marked with dollar signs piled at the entrance.

The black cat character releases the small bird character, who immediately covers its face with both hands. The cat turns its body and walks away toward the right edge of the frame. The open safe remains on the left, displaying a pile of round bags marked with dollar signs.

The black cat character runs toward the right edge of the frame, glancing back over its shoulder. The small bird character is absent from the scene. The open safe with stacked money bags remains on the left against the fence background.

The outdoor scene transitions to a black screen featuring a central white circle. This circular iris shrinks rapidly, reducing the visible white area to a smaller semi-circle shape. The black cat, bird character, and safe disappear from view as the frame darkens completely.

The scene transitions to an indoor room with a large telescope on a stand. An elderly man with a white beard and glasses stands beside it, gesturing with an open hand. To the left, a small black cat smiles broadly. A poster depicting a planet and moon hangs on the wall behind them.

The elderly figure with a white beard leans forward, clasping his hands near his waist while looking down. The small black cat stands to the left, looking up at the man with a wide smile. The large telescope on a stand and the wall poster depicting celestial bodies remain stationary in the background.

[2-6] The man clasps his hands at his waist while the cat smiles and raises its paws. The man looks downward as the cat continues gesturing with an open mouth.
[6-10] The man leans toward the telescope, shielding his eyes, then stands upright raising an index finger. He subsequently leans forward with hands clasped near his chest.

[18-20] A bearded figure stands near an open safe labeled "SAFE", holding a round bag marked with a dollar sign. He offers it to a small black cat who reaches out. The cat clutches the money bag against its chest, smiling broadly.
[20-24] The black cat walks briskly right, empty-handed, before reappearing holding the round money bag with a dollar sign, clutching it tightly while facing right.
[24-28] The cat spreads arms wide, holds the bag and waves, then stands empty-handed with a noticeably rounded, distended midsection against the plain background.
[28-30] The scene returns to the large metal box labeled "SAFE" on the left. The small black cat stands to the right, facing forward with arms bent, its midsection returned to normal size.

[30-34] A slender black cat stands beside a large metal box labeled "SAFE" with its door swung open on the left. [34-36] The character holds a round sack marked with a "$" sign with both hands. [36-38] The cat places the money bag back inside the safe and pushes the heavy door closed. [38-42] The character lifts the entire large metal box labeled "SAFE" onto its back and walks toward the right edge, carrying the heavy box off-screen until it disappears completely, leaving a plain background with a floor line.

[44-46] An iris wipe reveals an outdoor scene with a fence where a black cat turns the dial of a large metal box labeled SAFE while a small bird character watches, connected by a rope to a money bag held by the cat. [46-48] The safe door swings open to reveal round bags marked with dollar signs piled at the entrance as the cat stands beside the bird, gesturing with an arm toward it. [48-50] The black cat extends an arm to grab the small bird character by the neck while the safe door stays open with stacked bags. [50-52] The cat releases the bird, who immediately covers its face with both hands, as the cat turns its body and walks away toward the right edge. [52-54] The black cat runs toward the right edge, glancing back over its shoulder, leaving the bird absent while the open safe with stacked money bags remains on the left.
